ssp_generator_bagpipes

On this Page

  • generate_ssp_grid_bagpipes()
  • init_ssp_worker()

ssp_generator_bagpipes#

galsyn.ssp_generator_bagpipes.generate_ssp_grid_bagpipes(output_filename='ssp_spectra_bagpipes.hdf5', ages_gyr=None, logzsol_grid=None, gas_logu=-2.0, overwrite=False, n_jobs=-1)[source]#
galsyn.ssp_generator_bagpipes.init_ssp_worker(gas_logu_val, rest_frame_wave_val)[source]#

Initializer function for each worker process in the SSP generation. Initializes the common components for the Bagpipes model.
